Appearance.Description: Monitor Lizard-Kin with thick, Midnight Blue/Purple scales

Scar.Description: Milk-white vertical scar with heightened heat vision

Goggles.Description: Custom-made Forge Goggles with dark glass and magnifying lenses

Tail.Description: Powerful auxiliary limb with pale yellow/ivory diamond-shaped spines

Apron.Description: Charred, stiff, heat-resistant leather apron with screwdrivers and tools

Chemistry Set.Description: Glass chemistry set for brewing glues and patch-tapes

Structural Diagnosis.Description: Can diagnose structural issues without tools

Visual Limitations.Description: Blind spot on left side and vulnerable to bright light

The 'Nobility' Trigger.Description: Prone to offending those with undeserved power

Taste.Description: Detects metallic tangs and radiation leaks
